text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the dance studio...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Heya! D'ya think you could watch<n>me perform
for a sec? Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm blindsided by Smart Falcon's<n>sudden sweet
talk and find myself<n>dazedly agreeing to be her
sole<n>audience member.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Here I am with my trademark shiny,<n>chestnut
hair! ☆ I'm everyone's<n>adorable Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The name's Smart Falcon, but call me<n>Falco,
'kaaay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you've all been waiting for<n>my
signature chant! ☆ When I call out,<n>make sure to
answer loud and clear<n>with "Falco"!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Fa-Fa-Fa-Faaaaa... Your turn!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, someone's a little shy today.<n>Let's try
that again!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Fa-Fa-Fa-Faaaaa... Your turn!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay! Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! It feels so awesome when<n>the audience
answers back! While<n>we're at it, I'm gonna
make up some<n>longer cheers!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You and me! Who's pretty?<n>"Faaal-cooooo!"
"Who's the most<n>radiant Umadol?"
"Faaal-cooooo!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: How's that sound? Squee! I'm a<n>genius!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've gotta write this down!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I later hear rumors that Smart Falcon<n>was
spotted in the library furiously<n>scribbling in her
notebook.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're not allowed to feel<n>embarrassed at my
concerts! C'mon,<n>just keep at it until you shake
off your<n>shyness!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll get things nice and hyped up, so<n>muster up
your courage and cheer<n>along with me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Here I go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's creative ingenuity and<n>
enthusiasm does wonders, and<n>before I know it,
I find myself cheering<n>along with her.
